titleStmt.title: SII 38.234: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 234. (A.R. No. 234 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a pillar in the kitchen, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning and end of the inscription is lost. It registers a gift of 30 kaḻañju of gold to burn a perpetual lamp to the god Mahādēva of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. The ūrār of Kaṇḍayanallūr, a dēvadāna of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam received the above gift of gold and agreed to measure out 90 nāḻi of ghee every year perpetually by the measure, poṉṉāḻi, out of the interest of the endowed amount.
This inscription on the grounds of palaeography may be assigned to the tenth century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Eḻuntaruḷiirukku māṟan ciṅkam
neṭṭiveḷaikku pprasādittāṟ bhaṇṭāra
ttup poṉpeṟṟut tiruvoṟṟiyūr
mahādevarkku Ācandratāramum Orunan=tāviḷa
kkerippataṟku vaitta ponūrkkaṟ
cemmai muppatinkaḻañcu
Ipponkoṇṭu kaṭavom paiyūrkko
ṭṭattu tiruvoṟṟiyūrppuṟattu devatāṉa(m)
mākiya kaṇṭayanallūrom Ippoṉṉā
l Ācandratāramum nilaippoliyūṭṭā
ka tiruvoṟṟiyūr poṉṉāḻiyāl Āṭṭā
ṇṭuvarai toṇṇūṟunāḻiyeṇ
ṇaiyāka Ārāṟu tiṅkaḷāḷi ṉāṟpa
tti taññāḻi cey teṇṇaiyum
It tevarkoṭṭakārattukek koṇṭu ceṉṟu
Aṭṭuvomāṉom Itaṟṟiṟampiṟ [ tanmāsaṉa]
ttu nicati Eṭṭarai kāṇantaṇṭappaṭṭum
poliyūṭṭu muṭṭāmai
Digital edition of SII 38.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
